Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The software programs on our computers are available for sale at the counter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let me know when you've decided on what you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Various computer software are[n]lined up on the counter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These software might come in handy {f 0 1 2}if I[n]can use the shared computer at the dorm{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
